title: datura × candida
intro: Datura × candida, also known as sacred datura or angel's trumpet, is a hybrid of the Datura wrightii and Datura inoxia species, a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, antitussive, and anticholinergic effects, which can help to relieve muscle spasms, coughs, and other respiratory issues. The health benefits of Datura × candida include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of ADHD and other neurological disorders. Datura × candida is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of conditions.
